checkin.journal: Grateful for: Being alive, Having so many things in the world that many other people would want, It's funny that I am basically trading off some things for some things in life, right? I mean, who knows? Probably I'll be still nervous, if I will be working for somebody, this would be a proper disaster without the financial backup, but maybe it wouldn't turn out the way it did, Who knows?, Cosita family, friends ❤️❤️❤️, This beautiful room, this resort, I mean, fuck, I cannot take this for granted

supplements_list.name: mg glycinate 1 capsule (probably wont take it more)
